mapper.select: SELECT * from app_claim_teacher WHERE type <> 1 AND is_add = 2 AND address is not null
select a.* from app_claim_teacher as a LEFT JOIN app_user as b on a.user_id = b.id where a.type = 1 and a.current_position is not null AND b.is_location = 1
SELECT * from app_claim_teacher WHERE type = 1 AND current_position is not null
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM app_push_bill WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) <= date(create_time) AND track_state <> 1
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM app_push_bill WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) <= date(create_time)
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM app_push_bill WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) <= date(create_time) AND check_time is not null
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM app_push_bill WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) <= date(create_time) AND message_car_id is not null
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM app_indent WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) <= date(creat_time)
SELECT IFNULL(SUM(fixloss),0) FROM app_indent WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH) <= date(creat_time)
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM app_push_bill WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 7 Month) <= date(create_time) AND track_state <> 1
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM app_push_bill WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 7 Month) <= date(create_time)
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM app_push_bill WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 7 Month) <= date(create_time) AND check_time is not null
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM app_push_bill WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 7 Month) <= date(create_time) AND message_car_id is not null
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM app_indent WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 7 Month) <= date(creat_time)
